package rulefixtures

// scenario for struct_field_exposed_in_json: exported struct fields containing sensitive data (Password, Secret, Token, APIKey, PrivateKey) without `json:"-"` tags in API response structs
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
type Rule737NegativeRecord struct {
	UserID string `json:"user_id"`
	Token string `json:"-"`
}
